name: @totem/sdk
description: Official Totem blockchain SDK for multi-platform development

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:txpow && npm run build:server && npm run build:root-identity
scripts.test: cd packages/core && npm test && cd ../txpow && npm test
scripts.clean: for d in packages/*/; do (cd "$d" && npm run clean); done

author: Totem
